_comment: Overworld walking sprites for Team Piso Lore characters, generated with Gemini gemini-2.5-flash-image and post-processed (chroma-key + edge-erode + downscale + 16-color quantize) to 16x24 transparent PNGs. Style target: Pokemon FireRed/LeafGreen GBA overworld NPCs (see public/assets/sprites/chars/npcs.json atlas, ~14x20px). NOT yet integrated into the game. NOT a TexturePacker atlas — these are individual PNG frames named <id>_<dir>_<frame>.png.

characters.name: Marcelino
characters.desc: young dark-skinned Black man, large afro, round glasses, grey hoodie, blue jeans
characters.notes: Strong likeness, all 12 frames consistent in size and pose. Softer/more detailed than the crisp hand-pixeled atlas NPCs and ~1 head taller proportionally; would benefit from manual pixel cleanup before sitting next to atlas NPCs.

characters.name: Ivan "FinTips"
characters.desc: heavyset man, short brown hair, rectangular glasses, green polo, blue jeans
characters.notes: Best of the batch. Distinctive chubby silhouette + green polo + glasses read clearly at 16x24. Most consistent walk cycle and most directly drop-in-usable.

characters.name: Alvaro Alonso
characters.desc: young man, swept brown hair, grey blazer over white shirt, red/maroon chinos
characters.notes: Readable (brown hair / grey blazer / red pants). down_2 is the weakest frame (muddy face). Model occasionally hallucinated glasses he does not have in his portrait — visible in some side frames. Usable with minor cleanup.

characters.name: Mariel
characters.desc: young blonde woman, high ponytail, light lilac blazer, dark jeans
characters.notes: Weakest of the batch. The large blonde ponytail dominates the 16x24 frame so face/body detail is mostly lost; up/back frames are a blonde blob. Reads as 'blonde woman with big hair' but not much more. Model also added glasses not in her portrait. Recommend regenerating with a 'smaller/tighter hair, full body in frame, more body less head' prompt, or hand-pixeling.

honest_assessment: All four characters produced complete, size-consistent 4-direction x 3-frame walk cycles with recognizable likenesses. Compared to the hand-pixeled atlas NPCs (npcs.json, crisp high-contrast GBA tiles, ~2.5 heads tall) these AI sprites are SOFTER, lower-contrast, with thinner/less consistent outlines and slightly taller proportions (~3-3.5 heads). They are usable as map sprites but would look visibly more 'detailed/AI' next to atlas NPCs without manual pixel touch-up. Ranking: ivan_fintips (best) > marcelino (good) > alvaro_rival (ok) > mariel (weak). See /tmp/atlas_compare.png for a side-by-side vs real atlas NPCs.
